name: Gorre Dinesh Chandan Reddy

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
details: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms (C++), Object-Oriented Programming System(OOPS), Database Managment System(DBMS), Software Engineering,Computer Networks,Deep Learning

points: Designed and developed multiple software applications, including ML model development and data pipelines.
Worked on end-to-end Data Engineering and Applied AI projects, utilizing software development skills to deliver scalable solutions.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver software applications, ensuring timely and efficient delivery.
Developed a Flask application, demonstrating software development skills in a fast-paced environment.
Utilized software development principles to design and develop scalable backend solutions.

projects.title: Image-Based Entity Extraction with PyTesseract
points: Designed and developed an OCR-based software application to extract key information from product images.
Achieved 56% accuracy on the test dataset, showcasing the effectiveness of the software application.

projects.title: Mars Landmark Detection System
points: Developed an end-to-end deep learning project, utilizing software development skills to design and train a model.
Trained a model to classify images into eight classes, demonstrating the ability to develop scalable software applications.

achievements: Amazon ML Challenge - Top 200 out of 18500 teams
